"""
main.py -- CLI entry point for FormFiller_IA
==============================================
Usage:
    python main.py fill --url URL --data data.json --form form_name [--cdp PORT]
    python main.py record --url URL --form form_name [--cdp PORT]
    python main.py scan --url URL [--level full|frame] [--cdp PORT]

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# record
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
def cmd_record(args):
    """Record user interactions to build a form map."""
    cdp = args.cdp if args.cdp else None
    orch = _build_orchestrator(cdp_port=cdp)

    page = orch.page
    if args.url:
        page.goto(args.url, wait_until="domcontentloaded", timeout=30000)

    print(f"Recording form '{args.form}'...")
    print("Interact with the form in the browser. Press Ctrl+C when done.\n")

    orch.recorder.start_recording(page, args.form)
    try:
        while True:
            page.wait_for_timeout(1000)

art_recording(page, args.form)
    try:
        while True:
            page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        print("\nStopping recording...")

    form_map = orch.recorder.stop_recording()
    if form_map:
        orch.recorder.save_map(args.form, form_map)
        print(f"Form map saved as '{args.form}'")
    else:
        print("No interactions recorded.")

# scan
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
def cmd_scan(args):
    """Scan a page and print discovered fields."""
    from core.scanner import ScanLevel

    cdp = args.cdp if args.cdp else None
    orch = _build_orchestrator(cdp_port=cdp)

    page = orch.page

= args.cdp if args.cdp else None
    orch = _build_orchestrator(cdp_port=cdp)

    page = orch.page
    page.goto(args.url, wait_until="domcontentloaded", timeout=30000)

    level_map = {"full": ScanLevel.FULL, "frame": ScanLevel.FRAME}
    level = level_map.get(args.level, ScanLevel.FULL)

    print(f"Scanning {args.url} at level {level.name}...")
    result = orch.scanner.scan(level)

    print(f"\nScan result: {result}")
    print(f"Fields found: {len(result.fields)}")
    print(f"Iframes: {len(result.iframes)}")
    print(f"DOM hash: {result.dom_hash}")

    if result.fields:
        print("\nFields:")
        for i, f in enumerate(result.fields, 1):
            name = f.get("name") or f.get("id") or "(unnamed)"
            ftype = f.get("type", "?")
